creator: db@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to John Marino from comment #4)
> also sysutils/u-boot-beaglebone-eabi port depends on arm-eabi-gcc.  It's
> staged and maintained, but is at risk of being removed with arm-eabi-gcc. 
> (same maintainer as arm-eabi-binutils, already in CC)

This was why I stepped up to maintain this port if needed. ;)

There are a few embedded guys who are already competent with ports. I'd like to propose a new informal embedded porters group as there is overlap. 

For reference https://wiki.freebsd.org/PortsTeams
